apk.title: Build APK
apk.autoRunOnOpenDesc: Automatically run script when app is opened
apk.keepScreenOnDesc: Prevent screen from turning off during execution
apk.showLogDesc: Show floating log window during execution
apk.encryptDesc: AES-256-GCM encryption to protect source code
doc.quickStart.intro: Yyds.Auto is a Python Android automation framework based on ROOT/SHELL permissions. Scripts run independently on the device, import all APIs via from yyds import *. Supports both English and Chinese function names, easy for beginners.
doc.quickStart.step1Desc: Write Python scripts in the IDE using English or Chinese API
doc.quickStart.step2Desc: Push the project to the device and run it via the console
doc.quickStart.step3Desc: Package the script as a standalone APK and install on target devices
doc.chineseApi.intro: All English APIs have corresponding Chinese aliases. After from yyds import *, you can use them directly. Chinese and English functions are fully equivalent with identical parameters and return values, and can be mixed.
doc.chineseApi.cnTouch: 点击 / 双击 / 长按 / 滑动
doc.chineseApi.cnKey: 返回键 / 主页键 / 确认键
doc.chineseApi.cnOcr: 截图 / 文字识别 / 屏幕找字
doc.chineseApi.cnFindImage: 找图 / 屏幕找图 / 找图点击
doc.chineseApi.cnFindColor: 找色 / 取色 / 多点取色
doc.chineseApi.cnYolo: 目标检测 / 屏幕找目标
doc.chineseApi.cnUi: 控件匹配 / 控件存在
doc.chineseApi.cnWait: 等待文字 / 等待控件 / 等待图片
doc.chineseApi.cnApp: 打开应用 / 关闭应用 / 是否在应用内
doc.chineseApi.cnInput: 输入文字 / 智能输入 / 复制到剪贴板
doc.chineseApi.cnDevice: 屏幕尺寸 / 设备型号 / 前台包名
doc.chineseApi.cnSystem: 执行命令 / 提示 / 等待
doc.ocr.intro: Built-in PaddleOCR engine, supports mixed Chinese/English recognition. Returns ResOcr objects with text, x, y, w, h properties.
doc.findImage.intro: Based on OpenCV template matching. Template images should be placed in the project res/ directory.
doc.yolo.intro: Built-in NCNN inference engine, supports YOLOv8. Deploy model to device first, see YOLO Deployment section at bottom.
doc.ui.intro: UiAutomator-based widget lookup. Node objects have text, cls, bounds, center_x, center_y properties.
doc.scale.intro: Use coordinate scaling for automatic adaptation across different resolutions. Base resolution is 1080x2400.
doc.templates.intro: Pre-packaged common operation combos, complete multi-step operations in one line. Great for beginners.
doc.console.intro: Yyds.Auto App has a built-in floating console that displays logs and provides a stop button during script execution. Content output via print() is automatically shown in the floating window.
doc.arch.intro: Yyds.Auto uses an on-device standalone architecture. Python scripts execute directly on the Android device without PC connection.
doc.yoloDeploy.intro: Using custom YOLO models requires training and converting to NCNN format, then pushing to the device.
